conflicts.title: define_actor! macro planned but not implemented
conflicts.description: Plan and contract reference a define_actor! macro that was never implemented. Actor<M, H> implements IUnknown directly instead.

conflicts.title: send_any/recv_any type-erased methods planned but not implemented
conflicts.description: Contract references send_any/recv_any using Box<dyn Any + Send> that do not exist. Channels use generic ISender<T>/IReceiver<T> instead.

conflicts.title: Benchmark naming example uses capacity_4096 not in parameter set
conflicts.description: Naming example shows capacity_4096 but parameter set is {64, 1024, 16384}.

conflicts.title: No From<ReceptacleError> for RegistryError conversion
conflicts.description: Receptacle::connect returns ReceptacleError; connect_receptacle_raw returns RegistryError. No From conversion exists, requiring manual .map_err() in every implementation.

conflicts.title: IUnknown trait extended across specs without cross-reference
conflicts.description: Spec 001 defines IUnknown with 4 methods. Spec 002 adds connect_receptacle_raw as a 5th method. Neither spec cross-references the other regarding this extension.
